title: 2PCS Silicone Soap Dish, Anti-Slip Soap Holder Flexible, Non-slip and Portable Shower Soap Box, Self Draining Shower Soap Dish for Shower, Bathroom, Kitchen Sponges, Easy Cleaning
features: 【High Quality Material】The soap container is made of high quality silicone material, which is soft and not easily deformed, wear-resistant, and can be used by you for a long time.
【Drain Hole Design】The bottom of the soap dish is designed with drainage holes, so that the water can be drained in time and keep other items such as soap dry.
【Non-slip】There is a groove at the bottom of the self-draining soap dish, which can increase friction, does not slip, and is convenient to use. The oval shape also makes daily cleaning easier.
【Efficient Draining】-Easy to clean, no deformation.The simple design keeps the soap from slipping off the dish, while the slanted bottom keeps your soap dry by helping any water drain away.
【Multifunctional Holders】- Our handmade soap holder can be used to store soap and sponges in the bathroom. Suitable for soaps, sponges, scrubs, dishwashing brushes, razors, small accessories, etc.
description: Product Description 2PCS Soap Dish Soap Holder Silicone Soap Saver Portable Soap Dish Flexible Soap Tray Anti-Slip Self Draining Shower Soap HolderS for Shower, Bathroom, Kitchen Sponges - (Grey + White) Specification: Material: Silicone Colour: grey/ white Size: 11.5 x 8 cm Package includes: 1 x White soap dish 1 x Grey soap dish Sufficient Quantity: Three soap dishes of different colors , enough for your home or travel needs. Perfect Match: The soap dish is used with the foaming net to make the soap cleaning effect better . Lightweight and Portable : The silicone material makes it light enough for travel and use.
